name: hansogj-monorepo
description: monorepo root for @hansogj/music-utils and its libraries

scripts.update: npx npm-check-updates -i -t minor --deep && pnpm run post:update
scripts.update:majors: npx npm-check-updates -i -t latest --deep && pnpm run post:update
scripts.post:update: rm -rfv node_modules && pnpm prune && pnpm i

author: hansogj@gmail.com
